title: Campaign Performance board not displaying correct ad status

posts.author: mia.ashcroft (Mia Ashcroft)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

We’re struggling with an issue in our Meta x Supermetrics Campaign Performance board and wondered if anyone else has come across the same hurdle.

We’ve integrated our Meta ads but the Status column isn’t mirroring Ads Manager. Some ads say Active when they’ve ended, and some say Paused when they’ve completed.

Anyone in the same boat?!
